command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 "cat /home/jose/.openclaw/openclaw.json; echo === PROCESS ===; ps aux | grep openclaw | grep -v grep; echo === SERVICE ===; systemctl --user status openclaw-gateway --no-pager | head -20; echo === WHATSAPP LOG ===; journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway -n 30 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i whatsapp"
